items.description: Research and gather detailed information on the information gathering phase of web application pentesting, including techniques and tools used.
Investigate the vulnerability scanning phase, focusing on common vulnerabilities, tools, and methodologies.
Explore the exploitation phase, detailing techniques for exploiting vulnerabilities found in web applications.
Compile information on the reporting phase, including best practices for documenting findings and recommendations for remediation.
Synthesize findings from all phases into a cohesive outline of a pentest methodology for web applications.

name: get_todo_list
